LanguageData.SEX_MachinistRetribution: Your illegal actions have upset the inspectors. They have issued your colony a warning.
LanguageData.SEX_MachinistsBecomePermanentEnemy: The city states are now permanently hostile to you due to your disregard for their laws.
LanguageData.SEX_ReinforcementsDescription: A nearby city state has dispatched a small strike force to aid against the incoming raid. They are moving in to assist.
LanguageData.SEX_PatrolPassing: A patrol group from {0} is passing by.
LanguageData.SEX_DemandsDescription:
The envoy made a long and rather tedious speech about the greatness of the city states before making a series of demands and offers. These “generous proposals” amount to a thinly-veiled ultimatum.

Compliance with the demands will earn our colony the recognition of the city states and will open many new avenues, but it would mean submitting to their rule.

We can also refuse the terms. Ceremonial killing of the envoy would send a strong message about the colony's independence and might earn us the respect of certain factions that abhor the city states. However, doing so would almost certainly lead to war as the city states are unlikely to forgive the affront.
LanguageData.SEX_MachinistInspection:
A task force from {0} is here to inspect the colony.

They are here to ensure our colony is following the rules laid out in the polity charter. The armed men will not willingly leave our colony until they have completed their inspection.

The intrusion may upset some of our colonists. You may want to consider armed resistance if the inspection is an affront to the colony's independence.
LanguageData.SEX_MachinistEnvoy: A diplomatic envoy hailing from {0} is visiting the colony.\n\nThe machinist city states are a loose coalition of independent, urban settlements which have banded together for protection and mutual support. The diplomat at the head of this mission represents the federal government, sent to deliver news and establish relations. They are accompanied by a small contingent of bodyguards.
LanguageData.SEX_ForbiddenPlantsDescription: The inspectors have found illegal plants being cultivated in our colony.\n\nWe should destroy or harvest the plants if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_ForbiddenSlavesDescription: The inspectors have found slaves being exploited in our colony.\n\nWe should sell, kill or free the slaves if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_ForbiddenAnimalsDescription: The inspectors have found illegal animals being raised in our colony.\n\nWe should slaughter, sell or release the animals if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_ForbiddenMechsDescription: The inspectors have found illegal mechanoids being used in our colony.\n\nWe should dismantle the mechanoids if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_ForbiddenAndroidsDescription: The inspectors have found illegal androids being used in our colony.\n\nWe should kill, sell or free the androids if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_CannibalItemsDescription: The inspectors have found illegal human remains being used in our colony.\n\nWe should sell, consume or destroy the remains if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_DrugsDescription: The inspectors have found illegal narcotics in our colony.\n\nWe should destroy, sell or consume the narcotics if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_AntiDescription: The inspectors have found illegal antimatter munitions in our colony.\n\nWe should use, sell or destroy the munitions if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_BlazebulbDescription: The inspectors have found illegal blazebulb plants being cultivated in our colony.\n\nWe should destroy or harvest the plants if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_BloodfeedersDescription: The inspectors have found bloodfeeders being harbored in our colony.\n\nWe should kill, sell or banish the bloodfeeders if we want to comply with the city states' laws.
LanguageData.SEX_DrugCropsDescription: Cultivation of psychoactives like psychoid plants and their derivatives are banned under the charter.
LanguageData.SEX_HardDrugsDescription: All posession of narcotics and illegal psyactives are are banned under the charter. The text makes an exception for psychite tea, for xenos who have a biological dependency on psychite.
LanguageData.SEX_BoomalopesDescription: The ranching of boomalopes, boomrats and other combustible livestock is banned under the “Bombs and Boomers Act” of the charter.
LanguageData.SEX_MechanoidsDescription: All subpersona constructs with physical forms, both sapient and non-sapient, are banned under the charter. The text mentions past mechanoid raids which devastated frontier colonies and puts a heavy emphasis on the potential danger posed by these machines.
LanguageData.SEX_SlaveryDescription: All slavery is banned under the “Free Frontiers Act” of the charter.
LanguageData.SEX_CannibalismDescription: Cannibalism, in any form, is banned under the charter. This ban extends to the use of human leather.
LanguageData.SEX_AntigrainDescription: All antimatter munitions are banned under the charter. Antimatter technologies used for power generation are allowed, as long as the necessary safety precautions are taken.
LanguageData.SEX_SanguophagesDescription: Harboring bloodfeeders and sanguophages, including their thralls and offspring, is forbidden under the charter. The text argues that their parasitic lifestyle is incompatible with the values of freedom upheld by the city states.
LanguageData.SEX_CE_BlazebulbDescription: Cultivation of combustible plants like blazebulb is forbidden under the charter. The text mentions great fires and disasters caused by unchecked blazebulb farms and puts a heavy emphasis on the potential environmental disaster of the practice.
LanguageData.SEX_RecognitionDescription: Recognition as an independent polity: Our colony would be recognized as an independent polity submitting to the authority of the federal government. We would gain access to trade and other services normally restricted to city states.
LanguageData.SEX_RaidAssistanceDescription: The federal government maintains a reserve of military forces dedicated to providing military assistance to frontier colonies under attack. This force, if available, will immediately be dispatched to aid our colony in the case of a hostile raid.
LanguageData.SEX_TradersDescription: The city states have secure and reliable trade routes connecting the farthest-flung settlements. As a recognized polity, our colony would be made part of the trade network and gain a guaranteed amount of traders visiting our colony every per quadrum.
